titleStmt.title: SII 15.138: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 138. (B.K. No. 183 of 1926-27.) NARĒGAL, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of the village chāvaḍi.
This is dated the 5th regnal year of the king, Śārvari, Chaitra, śu. 11, [Pushyanakshatra], corresponding to 1180 A.D., March 9, Sunday. Pushya-nakshatra, however, was on the previous day.

It registers a gift of land for offerings to the god Kēdāradēva. It describes a Mahāpradhāna, Herilāḷa-Kannaḍa-sandhivigrahi whose name is lost and Mahāvaḍḍabyavahāri Kēśavayya. The record is damaged.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: Above this is another completely obliterated record.
div.p:
svasti śrīmatkaḷacu¨ryya saṁkamadēva vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivriddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdrā¨rkkatā
raṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmō śrīmanmahāpradhāna hērilāḷa kannaḍasaṁdhivigrahi bā
hattara niyōgādhipati
śrīmanmahāvaḍḍabyavahāri kēśavayya ma¨rtthijana ciṁtāma
ṇiyuṁ sakaḷakaḷādhara duṣṭanigraha viśiṣṭapratipāḷane yiṁdāḷu
ttami¨rddu dha¨rmma prasaṁgadiṁ sakaḷadha¨rmmaṁgaḷaṁ pratipāḷisuttami¨rddu śrīmatkaḷacu ¨ryya cakrava¨rtti śrī saṁkamadēvava¨rṣada 5 neya sā¨rvvari saṁvatsarada
caitra suddha yēkādaśi puśyā byatīpātadaṁdu saṁkramāṇa dēvarasaru śrī kēdāradēvara naivēdyakke biṭṭa keyi
sthaḷa beṭageṟeya dāriyiṁ paḍuva teṁka karabhūmiyiṁ baḍaga
sa¨rvvanamasyavāgi biṭṭa mattaru hanneraḍu Intī dha¨rmmamaṁ gāvuṁḍugaḷumaṟuvatto kkalu samayaṁgaḷumācaṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ pratipāḷisuvaru [.]
Digital edition of SII 15.138 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
